chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 1/8: Pack at Home
scene: 你要给国内家人寄礼物，跟室友确认包裹内容。（对话链：邮局）

turns.en: What are you sending? Need customs forms?

turns.cn: 衣服和零食，应该填申报单。
turns.en: Clothes and snacks. I'll need a customs form.

turns.cn: 箱子够结实吗？我有多余胶带。
turns.en: Is the box sturdy enough? I have extra tape.
Please seal it. I'm going to the post office this afternoon.
Address in Chinese or English?
Both English and Chinese, just in case.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 2/8: Ship International
scene: 你在邮局柜台寄包裹到中国。（对话链：邮局）

turns.en: Hi, domestic or international?
To China. What's the fastest option?

turns.cn: 特快大概五到七天，标准件两周。
turns.en: Express is about five to seven days. Standard is two weeks.

turns.cn: 这个盒子五磅，特快多少钱？
turns.en: This box is five pounds. How much for express?

turns.cn: 六十八美元，要填海关申报单。
turns.en: Sixty-eight dollars. You'll need to fill out a customs form.

turns.cn: 里面是衣服和零食，价值大概五十美元。
turns.en: It's clothes and snacks, worth about fifty dollars.
Okay. Here's your tracking number.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 3/8: Buy Stamps
scene: 顺便买邮票寄几封国内信件。（对话链：邮局）

turns.cn: 你好，我要寄三封信到美国国内。
turns.en: Hi, I need to mail three letters domestically.
Regular or certified mail?
Regular is fine. How much are stamps?

turns.cn: 一张六十八美分，三张两美元零四。
turns.en: Sixty-eight cents each, two oh four for three.
Where's the mailbox?
The blue one on your left as you exit.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 4/8: Track a Package
scene: 几天后，你查国内寄来的包裹进度。（对话链：邮局）

turns.en: Did your mom's package arrive yet?

turns.cn: 显示在海关，可能还要几天。
turns.en: It shows at customs. Might take a few more days.
Send me the tracking number. I'll watch it.

turns.cn: 发你了，到了我请你吃饭。
turns.en: Sent. Dinner's on me when it lands.
Deal.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 5/8: Pick Up Held Package
scene: 你收到黄色通知单，去邮局取包裹。（对话链：邮局）

turns.cn: 取件吗？请出示通知单和证件。
turns.en: Picking up a package? Notice slip and ID, please.
Here you go. It's the yellow slip.
Please sign here.

turns.cn: 包裹能再保留几天吗？我周末没空。
turns.en: Can you hold it a few more days? I wasn't free this weekend.

turns.cn: 免费保留十五天，超期会退回。
turns.en: We hold it fifteen days for free. After that it goes back.
Okay, I'll take it today.
Here you go. Careful, it's a bit heavy.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 6/8: Wrong Address
scene: 你寄出的包裹被退回，邮局通知你来处理。（对话链：邮局）

turns.cn: 这个包裹地址不全，退回来了。
turns.en: This package came back. The address was incomplete.

turns.cn: 能帮我改地址重新寄吗？
turns.en: Can you help me fix the address and resend it?
Yes. Additional postage is twelve dollars.

turns.cn: 我写上邮编，这次应该没问题。
turns.en: I'll add the zip code. Should be fine this time.
All set. Here's the new tracking number.
Thank you.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 7/8: Courier at the Door
scene: 快递员送货上门，你在家签收。（对话链：邮局）

turns.en: Hi, please sign for this package.

turns.cn: 外包装有点压扁，能先检查一下吗？
turns.en: The box looks crushed. Can I inspect it first?
Sure. Take photos if anything's damaged.
Contents are fine. I'll sign.
Thanks. Have a good day.

chain.title: Post Office from Mailing to Pickup

title: Chain 8/8: Family Package Arrives
scene: 你拆开妈妈寄来的包裹，打电话报平安。（对话链：邮局）

turns.en: Did you get the package?

turns.cn: 刚收到，腊肉和茶叶都完好。
turns.en: Just got it. The cured meat and tea are fine.
Customs didn't seize anything?
No, just a week late.
Let me know if you like the food.
Will do. Thanks, Mom.
